bme_tile_info_t Struct Reference
[Bare Metal Environment APIs]

Information for a particular tile. More...


Data Fields

pos_t pos
 Coordinates of tile.
int index
 Index of tile in global array.
int exec_type
 Executable type running on tile.
int client_num
 Client number; identical for two tiles if and only if they are in the same BME application or are under the control of the same supervisor.
int num_mem_segs
 Number of memory segments that are permanently mapped in this tile's TLBs.
bme_mem_seg_info_t mem_seg [BME_MAX_MEM_SEGMENTS]
 Memory segments assigned to tile.
uint32_t heap_size
 Size of heap for this tile, in bytes.
VA heap_start_va
 Virtual address of start of heap for this tile.

Detailed Description

Information for a particular tile.

Field Documentation

pos_t bme_tile_info_t::pos

Coordinates of tile.

int bme_tile_info_t::index

Index of tile in global array.

int bme_tile_info_t::exec_type

Executable type running on tile.

int bme_tile_info_t::client_num

Client number; identical for two tiles if and only if they are in the same BME application or are under the control of the same supervisor.

int bme_tile_info_t::num_mem_segs

Number of memory segments that are permanently mapped in this tile's TLBs.

bme_mem_seg_info_t bme_tile_info_t::mem_seg[BME_MAX_MEM_SEGMENTS]

Memory segments assigned to tile.

uint32_t bme_tile_info_t::heap_size

Size of heap for this tile, in bytes.

VA bme_tile_info_t::heap_start_va

Virtual address of start of heap for this tile.
